name: The Ryder Cup Room
address: Pier 59 - 18th St. & Hudson River Park, New York, NY 10011
about: Chelsea Piers Golf Club is a full-service golf facility located in New York, NY, offering a comprehensive range of golf services. The venue features a driving range, private lessons, and membership programs, catering to both first-time players and competitive athletes. With expert coaching, welcoming club environments, and engaging programs, the facility provides spaces for training, growth, and social events, making it suitable for various skill levels and group activities.
why_golfers_like_it: Expert coaching available for all skill levels
Comprehensive membership programs and private lessons
Suitable for both casual play and competitive training
Hosts private events and corporate team building activities

food_and_drink.notes: On-site dining options available at Water Hazard Bar & Lounge
Full bar service available at Water Hazard Bar & Lounge

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Club rentals are available on-site for those who don't have their own equipment.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: On-site dining options are available at Water Hazard Bar & Lounge. Outside food and drink policies are not specified.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Playing time for 18 holes on simulators is not specified, but typical simulator sessions range from 1-2 hours depending on group size and pace.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Chelsea Piers offers programs for juniors and youth, making it suitable for families and children.
